intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“新房子 -> 车堵门口 -> No Parking 没效果 -> Medusa 笑话 -> 还没有变成石头”的问题链读顺。

sentences.text: Jasper White is one of those rare people who believes in ancient myths.
sentences.focus_zh: one of those rare people who... 要读成一组；ancient myths 是古代神话。

sentences.text: He has just bought a new house in the city, but ever since he moved in, he has had trouble with cars and their owners.
sentences.focus_zh: has just bought 读出最近发生；ever since he moved in 后面要稍停。

sentences.text: When he returns home at night, he always finds that someone has parked a car outside his gate.
sentences.focus_zh: When he returns home at night 是时间状语；outside his gate 是堵住入口的位置。

sentences.text: Because of this, he has not been able to get his own car into his garage even once.
sentences.focus_zh: Because of this 后面稍停；has not been able to 和 even once 要读出“到现在一次也没有”。

sentences.text: Jasper has put up 'No Parking' signs outside his gate, but these have not had any effect.
sentences.focus_zh: put up signs 是立起标志；have not had any effect 是到现在仍然没有效果。

sentences.text: I asked him what it was and he told me that it was Medusa, the Gorgon.
sentences.focus_zh: Medusa, the Gorgon 是同位语，读成“美杜莎，这个 Gorgon”。

sentences.text: Jasper hopes that she will turn cars and their owners to stone.
sentences.focus_zh: turn... to stone 是变成石头；cars and their owners 要连成一个对象组。

sentences.text: But none of them has been turned to stone yet!
sentences.focus_zh: has been turned 是被动语态；yet 放在句尾，读出“到现在还没有”的笑点。
